# Corridor Key Toolbox

> Corridor Key Toolbox brings Corridor Key to Final Cut Pro.

- [Corridor Key Toolbox](https://CorridorKeyToolbox.fcp.cafe/readme.md): Corridor Key Toolbox
- [Download](https://CorridorKeyToolbox.fcp.cafe/download.md): Corridor Key Toolbox is coming soon!
- [System Requirements](https://CorridorKeyToolbox.fcp.cafe/system-requirements.md): ScriptStar requires Final Cut Pro 10.6.5 or later.
- [How To Use](https://CorridorKeyToolbox.fcp.cafe/how-to-use.md): Coming soon!
- [Support](https://CorridorKeyToolbox.fcp.cafe/support.md): The best place to get support is the FCP Cafe Discord.
- [Frequently Asked Questions](https://CorridorKeyToolbox.fcp.cafe/faq.md): Coming soon!
- [Troubleshooting](https://CorridorKeyToolbox.fcp.cafe/troubleshooting.md): Apologies in advance if you have any trouble using Corridor Key Toolbox.
- [Release Notes](https://CorridorKeyToolbox.fcp.cafe/release-notes.md): 🎉 Released:
- [Uninstall](https://CorridorKeyToolbox.fcp.cafe/uninstall.md): To uninstall Corridor Key Toolbox, simply drag the application to the trash/bin.
- [Credits](https://CorridorKeyToolbox.fcp.cafe/credits.md): Corridor Key Toolbox has been thrown together by Chris at LateNite.
- [Privacy Policy](https://CorridorKeyToolbox.fcp.cafe/privacy.md): This is the privacy policy for the Corridor Key Toolbox, macOS Application that is available on the macOS App Store and TestFlight.
